Indicative Term Sheet — Strategic Investment in Luntian Renewables Corporation (Philippines context; non-binding and subject to definitive agreements)
Parties: Investor — Maharlika Grid Ventures Holdings, Inc.; Issuer — Luntian Renewables Corporation, a PH corporation listed on the local stock exchange SME Board under placeholder symbol “LRCX0” (pseudo-ISIN: PHXX00LRCX00; invalid, for drafting only)
Instrument: Unsecured convertible notes with a fixed maturity and standard anti-dilution; aggregate principal and conversion mechanics to be finalized in the definitive documents
Use of Proceeds: To expand rooftop solar and microgrid deployments under the ESG-linked “Project Amihan” and fund working capital; no proceeds allocated to virtual-asset issuance or custody activities
Conditions Precedent: Board and shareholder approvals, increase in authorized capital, pre-clearance for additional listing with the stock exchange, and confirmation of compliance with the Securities Regulation Code and applicable PH data-privacy requirements
Closing: Targeted within Q3 2026, subject to completion of due diligence (financial, legal, environmental), KYC by the investor’s banking partners, and execution of customary security and escrow arrangements with IslaBank Trust & Custody (fictional)
Information Control: Investor’s capital-markets arm will maintain an information-barrier playbook; the issuer’s HR will coordinate insider-list maintenance for training and blackout reminders (education-only, not a trading directive)
Compliance & Training: “Crypto Payments Pilot” is a marketing webinar title used for client education only; it does not involve token issuance, wallets, or exchange operations and does not affect the issuer’s financials
Cybersecurity: A tabletop incident drill is scheduled with the issuer’s IT vendor; no operational impact is expected, and no customer PII will be used beyond generic test labels (“ID: XX-000000”)
Tax & Fees: Documentary stamp tax and withholding taxes to be for the issuer’s account at prevailing rates prescribed by the Philippine tax authority; listing and transfer fees per stock exchange schedule
Representations: Standard corporate authority, no sanctions violations, no undisclosed related-party transactions, and continued adherence to issuer’s sustainability reporting policies (publicly available 2024 ESG report dated 31 Mar 2025)
Disclosure: Any material information arising from this transaction will be reported via a PH-style Form 17-C notice on the issuer’s disclosure portal contemporaneous with signing; investor-relations@lrc.example.ph and +63-XXX-IRHELP are role contact points
Data Room: Only de-identified HR, tax, and banking records will be shared; personal data will be masked consistent with the Data Privacy Act, and sample numbers will not correspond to real accounts
Commercial Terms: No financial covenants are set forth in this indicative summary; negative pledge, permitted liens, and restrictions on additional pari passu debt to be negotiated in final documentation
Governing Law: Laws of the Republic of the Philippines; disputes subject to arbitration in Metro Manila before a PH arbitral institution (fictional)
Positive MNPI Span: The parties acknowledge a pending but not-yet-announced amendment to a power purchase agreement between the issuer and Dalisay Electric Cooperative, which will be treated as material non-public information until the issuer files a Form 17-C notice and posts on its public disclosure page
